column1: Igarashi Motors India Ltd is engaged in the production and export of Permanent Magnet DC Motors for the Automotive Sector especially for the passenger vehicle sector [1] It was incorporated as CG Igarashi Motors Limited in 1992 as a JV between Crompton Greaves Ltd(India), Igarashi Electric Works Ltd, Japan, and International Components Corporation, USA. Over a period, IEWL consolidated its stake in the Company by acquiring a stake of exited JV Partners. [2]
